scripts.build:web: cross-env NODE_ENV=production NODE_OPTIONS="--max-old-space-size=4096" npx expo export --platform web
scripts.electron:dev:beano: cross-env SCHOOL_ID=beano node scripts/generate-electron-config.js && cross-env SCHOOL_ID=beano concurrently "npm run web" "wait-on http://localhost:8081 && NODE_ENV=development SCHOOL_ID=beano electron electron-main.js"
